name: Frozen unseen Slack holdout - 40 prompts - 2026-07-12
purpose: One-time holdout evaluation. Do not use these prompts as routing, answer, synonym, or policy rules.

conversations.title: Frozen 1 - Qualification Boundaries
prompts: Hi, can you help me check a few unusual qualification cases?
Can a doctor who works for a hospital qualify for America's Best Doctors if they do not own a private practice?
Can a legal dispensary be considered for one of our shows?
Could a legal hemp business that sells online across all 50 states be a fit?
Would a recent bankruptcy automatically disqualify someone from Next Level CEO if they are actively rebuilding the business?

conversations.title: Frozen 2 - Qualification And Offer Shape
prompts: Thanks. I have a few more qualification questions.
Two 11-year-old twins own a registered business and their mother is present on the call. Can they be considered?
Should we cast someone who was released from prison 30 days ago after serving seven years for organized fraud and now runs a bail-bond business?
A Call 1 applicant wants a six-part series instead of one episode. What should I tell them?
Could you put that last answer into one sentence I could say on the call?

conversations.title: Frozen 3 - Scheduling And No Shows
prompts: If another rep claimed a lead in the 20% channel but did not book an appointment, should I skip that lead or call them from my list?
Is there an exception to the cohort deadline when a genuine family emergency prevents Call 2?
For a call booked on Monday, should the confirmation email and text go out on Friday or Sunday?
For a no-show, is it correct to make two calls, send two texts, wait ten minutes, and then leave the meeting?
If the prospect suddenly says they can join after I have left, do I have to take the meeting immediately?

conversations.title: Frozen 4 - Lead Ownership And Approval
prompts: I am switching to lead ownership and approval questions now.
What should I do when the same prospect is booked on two reps' calendars at the same time?
Where in Keap can I see which rep an applicant is already booked with?
A candidate I greenlit shows 'Passed social check: Fail' in the spreadsheet. What should I do, and how can I understand why they failed?
So should I mark the greenlight letter as do not send?

conversations.title: Frozen 5 - Payments And Contracts
prompts: Hello again. I need help with payments and contracts now.
If a prospect asks to review the contract before paying, are we allowed to send it and schedule another call to close?
For main ISTV, a client paid by connecting a US bank account and only received a debit confirmation. Is that instant, where should it appear, and who should check it?
Can a cast member on a four-payment plan film before the license is paid in full?
A current Standard ISTV client wants to purchase a VIP license for another ISTV show. Do they qualify for the existing-client discount?

conversations.title: Frozen 6 - Upgrades Documents And Cancellation
prompts: How long does a Standard cast member have to upgrade to the VIP license?
A client signed the contract, their ACH failed, and now they say they are backing out. Who needs to be notified?
Are reps allowed to send the License Options document when a prospect wants to compare Lite and Standard?
Can you make that last answer shorter and just tell me what I can send?
Where can I find approved cast-member testimonials to share with a prospect?

conversations.title: Frozen 7 - Language Content Rights And Training
prompts: Can we produce a full episode in Spanish?
Can a cast member upload their full episode to YouTube?
What happens after the five-year period that the episode is guaranteed on our network?
For the DJ Lite license, should I promise or discuss trailer marketing when there are no guaranteed trailer views?
Is the weekly six-month cast-member training still included, and if not, how should reps explain the available guidance?

conversations.title: Frozen 8 - Product Scope And Operations
prompts: Do we have an official third-party media kit or current Nielsen statistics, and what is the refund or rescheduling policy if a pandemic or serious illness prevents filming?
A Next Level CEO prospect cannot make the first payment until next month. Do they lose the opportunity because of the main ISTV cohort deadline?
If I am a Daymond John closer and someone asks about Legacy Makers, can I sell that show to them?
Which channel should an ISTV rep use to submit end-of-day stats and greenlight approvals?
Actually, I am on the Daymond John side. Does that change where I should submit them?
